title: gutenbergia pumila
intro: Gutenbergia pumila is a plant species commonly found in eastern and southern Africa, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gutenbergia pumila include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions, and its leaves and roots are used to make teas, oils, and tinctures.
